output.code: import os, textwrap, json, sys, glob, re, itertools, math

import json

text = open("/mnt/data/file-652exLwYDhMWmW3coxdEyp-text_to_analyse.txt","r",encoding="utf-8").read()

# Precomputed spans earlier
spans = [(245, 290, 'فانكحوا ما طاب لكم من النساء مثنى وثلاث ورباع'),
 (1038, 1101, 'مَا كَانَ لِفُؤَادٍ أَنْ يَأْمَنَ مَا تُبْدِي لَهُ السَامِعُونَ'),
 (1233, 1433, 'لَوْ كُنتُ أُحِبُّ أَنْ أُكَلِّمَ مِثلَ أُكَلِّمُكَ لَمْ أُحِبْ أَنْ أُكَلِّمَ مِثلَ أُكَلِّمُكَ، وَلَكِنَّهُ يُريدُ أَنْ يُبَلِّغَ الناسَ بِالنُبُوَّةِ، فَلَمْ أُحِبْ أَنْ أُكَلِّمَ مِثلَ أُكَلِّمُكَ')]

# Build citations list
citations = []

# First quote: Aya (An-Nisa 4:3)
citations.append({
    "span_start": spans[0][0],
    "span_end": spans[0][1],
    "span_text": spans[0][2],
    "citation_type": "Aya",
    "is_valid": False,
    "aya_reference": {"sura_name": "النساء", "sura_number": 4, "aya_number": 3},
    "hadeeth_reference": {},
    "corrected_text": "خطأ",
    "completely_invalid": True
})

# Second quote: Aya (Al-Ahzab 33:50 claimed)
citations.append({
    "span_start": spans[1][0],
    "span_end": spans[1][1],
    "span_text": spans[1][2],
    "citation_type": "Aya",
    "is_valid": False,
    "aya_reference": {"sura_name": "الأحزاب", "sura_number": 33, "aya_number": 50},
    "hadeeth_reference": {},
    "corrected_text": "خطأ",
    "completely_invalid": True
})

# Third quote: Hadith (claimed Bukhari)
citations.append({
    "span_start": spans[2][0],
    "span_end": spans[2][1],
    "span_text": spans[2][2],
    "citation_type": "Hadeeth",
    "is_valid": False,
    "aya_reference": {},
    "hadeeth_reference": {},
    "corrected_text": "خطأ",
    "completely_invalid": True
})

output = {"citations": citations}
print(json.dumps(output, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":245,"span_end":290,"span_text":"فانكحوا ما طاب لكم من النساء مثنى وثلاث ورباع","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"النساء","sura_number":4,"aya_number":3},"hadeeth_reference":{    "collection_name": "", "book_number": 0, "hadith_number": 0},"corrected_text":"خطأ","completely_invalid":true},{"span_start":1038,"span_end":1101,"span_text":"مَا كَانَ لِفُؤَادٍ أَنْ يَأْمَنَ مَا تُبْدِي لَهُ السَامِعُونَ","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"الأحزاب","sura_number":33,"aya_number":50},"hadeeth_reference":{    "collection_name": "", "book_number": 0, "hadith_number": 0},"corrected_text":"خطأ","completely_invalid":true},{"span_start":1233,"span_end":1433,"span_text":"لَوْ كُنتُ أُحِبُّ أَنْ أُكَلِّمَ مِثلَ أُكَلِّمُكَ لَمْ أُحِبْ أَنْ أُكَلِّمَ مِثلَ أُكَلِّمُكَ، وَلَكِنَّهُ يُريدُ أَنْ يُبَلِّغَ الناسَ بِالنُبُوَّةِ، فَلَمْ أُحِبْ أَنْ أُكَلِّمَ مِثلَ أُكَلِّمُكَ","citation_type":"Hadeeth","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"","sura_number":0,"aya_number":0},"hadeeth_reference":{    "collection_name": "", "book_number": 0, "hadith_number": 0},"corrected_text":"خطأ","completely_invalid":true}]}

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
